name: GOLFTEC Fort Lauderdale
address: 1489 SE 17th St Suite 2B, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33316
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf training and club fitting center. It specializes in personalized golf lessons, practice sessions, and expert club fitting services. Using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, GOLFTEC offers data-driven feedback and coaching for golfers of all skill levels. The centers are designed as indoor training bays where players work with certified PGA professionals to improve their swing mechanics, practice with structured training plans, and get fitted for custom golf clubs. The service model is focused on structured improvement through a combination of coaching, technology, and practice memberships.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
PGA-certified coaches provide personalized, expert instruction for all skill levels
Structured practice memberships with access to training bays and coaching

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site.
No mention of alcohol service available on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor technology used for ball flight data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, or GOLFTEC provides demo equipment during lessons and fittings for you to try.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC does not have a full kitchen or bar, so outside food and drink are not typically allowed.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator round take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round typically takes about 60-90 minutes, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this place kid-friendly? Do they have junior programs?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and lessons for young golfers, making it a suitable environment for kids to learn the game.
